description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds a project using Conan on multiple platforms. The workflow should trigger on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. Use a matrix strategy to run the build on different operating systems (windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, macos-latest) and platforms (null, gl3, d3d9, ps2), with specific exclusions. For each job, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install Conan, configure it, and then use it to install dependencies, build, and package the project.
